TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavCon-earthquake_abas_haciang
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yauiku tazian ayi tamaisuan tina haw.
S.PHON: jauiku taz~rian aji tamaisuan tina haw.
S.FORM: yauiku tazian ayi tamaisuan tina haw.
S.PHON: jauiku taz~rian aji tamaisuan tina haw.
S.TRANSL: 我在阿姨你這邊.
I'm here at your place, my dear aunt.

S.FORM: haw.
S.PHON: haw.
S.FORM: haw.
S.PHON: haw.
S.TRANSL: 嗯.
Yeah.

S.FORM: mawtuiku timaisuan.
S.PHON: mawtuiku timaisuan.
S.FORM: mawtuiku timaisuan.
S.PHON: mawtuiku timaisuan.
S.TRANSL: 我來到你家.
I came to your place.

S.FORM: ngidiku ipil tu masangay a zau utuz zinna nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮiku ipir tu masaŋaj a z~rau utuz~r z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: ngidiku ipil tu masangay a zau utuz zinna nani.
S.PHON: ŋiɮiku ipir tu masaŋaj a z~rau utuz~r z~rinna nani.

TRANSL.notes: 他(某位台大學生)說「我想要聽聽有關從前地震的事」.

S.TRANSL: 他 說「我想要聽聽有關從前地震的事」.

TRANSL.notes: He (an NTU student) said, 'I want to hear something about the earthquake in the past.'

S.TRANSL: He said, 'I want to hear something about the earthquake in the past.'

S.FORM: naquni wawayta nazau na utuz tazian ta pakteRungan zinku timaisu nani.
S.PHON: naquni wawajta naz~rau na utuz~r taz~rian ta paktəʁuŋan z~rinku timaisu nani.
S.FORM: naquni wawayta nazau na utuz tazian ta pakteRungan zinku timaisu nani.
S.PHON: naquni wawajta naz~rau na utuz~r taz~rian ta paktəʁuŋan z~rinku timaisu nani.
S.TRANSL: 我跟你說,「新社這裡的地震情形是如何」.
I said to you, 'How was the earthquake here in PakteRung?'

S.FORM: naquni a aisu m qaqaqa supaR tu zau tu utuz zinku.
S.PHON: naquni a aisu m qaqaqa supaʁ tu z~rau tu utuz~r z~rinku.
S.FORM: naquni a aisu m qaqaqa supaR tu zau tu utuz zinku.
S.PHON: naquni a aisu m qaqaqa supaʁ tu z~rau tu utuz~r z~rinku.
S.TRANSL: 我想你不管如何年紀都比我長,應該知道有關地震的事.
I think that since you're older than me, anyhow you'd know something about the earthquake.

S.FORM: nayau sayzi Raynguanku qaya utuz ni XXXX azu.
S.PHON: najau sajz~ri ʁajŋuanku qaja utuz~r ni **** az~ru.
S.FORM: nayau sayzi Raynguanku qaya utuz ni XXXX azu.
S.PHON: najau sajz~ri ʁajŋuanku qaja utuz~r ni **** az~ru.
S.TRANSL: 那樣也許沒錯,但是我並不知道什麼有關地震的事情,好像...
That might be the case, but I know nothing about the earthquake, like..

S.FORM: eh m Raynguanku qaya yu.
S.PHON: əh m ʁajŋuanku qaja ju.
S.FORM: eh m Raynguanku qaya yu.
S.PHON: əh m ʁajŋuanku qaja ju.
S.TRANSL: 我也不知道耶.
I don't know, either.

S.FORM: pasyani niqasianemanku Raymazuqay zinku a.
S.PHON: pasjani niqasianəmanku ʁajmaz~ruqaj z~rinku a.
S.FORM: pasyani niqasianemanku Raymazuqay zinku a.
S.PHON: pasjani niqasianəmanku ʁajmaz~ruqaj z~rinku a.
S.TRANSL: 我也不知道往哪裡想,我想我很笨.
My thought wanders around, and I think I'm stupid.

S.FORM: u qawanayti aisu supaRay msanemay nani.
S.PHON: u qawanajti aisu supaʁaj msanəmaj nani.
S.FORM: u qawanayti aisu supaRay msanemay nani.
S.PHON: u qawanajti aisu supaʁaj msanəmaj nani.

TRANSL.notes: 所以應該由比較知道而且也比較聰明的你(來說地震的故事).

S.TRANSL: 所以應該由比較知道而且也比較聰明的你 .

TRANSL.notes: So (the one who can tell us the story) should be you, who are both knowledgeable and smart.

S.TRANSL: So should be you, who are both knowledgeable and smart.

S.FORM: qametansu snikawmaanna a zana utuz a yau.
S.PHON: qamətansu snikawmaanna a z~rana utuz~r a jau.
S.FORM: qametansu snikawmaanna a zana utuz a yau.
S.PHON: qamətansu snikawmaanna a z~rana utuz~r a jau.

TRANSL.notes: 你記得他說的,那個地震的(事情).

S.TRANSL: 你記得他說的,那個地震的 .
You remember what he said about that earthquake.

S.FORM: Raynguanku aikuan.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanku aikuan.
S.FORM: Raynguanku aikuan.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanku aikuan.
S.TRANSL: 我真的不知道.
I really don't know.

S.FORM: aisu pasikawma ya.
S.PHON: aisu pasikawma ja.
S.FORM: aisu pasikawma ya.
S.PHON: aisu pasikawma ja.
S.TRANSL: 你來說吧.

TRANSL.notes: (Come on), tell us the story.

S.TRANSL: , tell us the story.

S.FORM: nayau ya naquni a qeni utuzanta naquni qenasupaRansu zinku ya.
S.PHON: najau ja naquni a qəni utuz~ranta naquni qənasupaʁansu z~rinku ja.
S.FORM: nayau ya naquni a qeni utuzanta naquni qenasupaRansu zinku ya.
S.PHON: najau ja naquni a qəni utuz~ranta naquni qənasupaʁansu z~rinku ja.
S.TRANSL: 那樣啊,不過我還是覺得你應該是知道我們以前地震的事.
Well, but I still somehow think that you know something about the earthquake that happened to us in the past.

S.FORM: nani yaupama aimi tatebaRungan.
S.PHON: nani jaupama aimi tatəβaʁuŋan.
S.FORM: nani yaupama aimi tatebaRungan.
S.PHON: nani jaupama aimi tatəβaʁuŋan.

TRANSL.notes: 嗯, (那是發生在)我們還住在TebaRung的時候.

S.TRANSL: 嗯, 我們還住在TebaRung的時候.

TRANSL.notes: Well, (that happened when) we still lived in TebaRung.

S.TRANSL: Well, we still lived in TebaRung.

S.FORM: yau mutuz nani yauimi qman sataRbabi nani.
S.PHON: jau mutuz~r nani jauimi qman sataʁβaβi nani.
S.FORM: yau mutuz nani yauimi qman sataRbabi nani.
S.PHON: jau mutuz~r nani jauimi qman sataʁβaβi nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們那時候正在吃早餐,然後地震就來了.
When we were having breakfast, the earthquake happened.

S.FORM: yauti utuz a yau nianpa nizanna bibiaq na utuz a kaysin.
S.PHON: jauti utuz~r a jau nianpa niz~ranna βiβiaq na utuz~r a kajsin.
S.FORM: yauti utuz a yau nianpa nizanna bibiaq na utuz a kaysin.
S.PHON: jauti utuz~r a jau nianpa niz~ranna βiβiaq na utuz~r a kajsin.
S.TRANSL: 地震就來啦,然後地震就把所有的碗都震倒了,真是可惜阿.
The earthquake happened. It's a pity that all the bowls fell off due to the earthquake.

S.FORM: m ah nayau a utuz a yau masang.
S.PHON: m ah najau a utuz~r a jau masaŋ.
S.FORM: m ah nayau a utuz a yau masang.
S.PHON: m ah najau a utuz~r a jau masaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 從前的地震就是那樣.
The earthquake in the past is like that.

S.FORM: qaytisan qaya haw.
S.PHON: qajtisan qaja haw.
S.FORM: qaytisan qaya haw.
S.PHON: qajtisan qaja haw.
S.TRANSL: 很危險.

TRANSL.notes: (It's) dangerous.

S.TRANSL: dangerous.

S.FORM: m nani unayti kwa masesebangti kwa peliyas tawian tap tapungkangan.
S.PHON: m nani unajti kwa masəsəβaŋti kwa pərijas tawian tap tapuŋkaŋan.
S.FORM: m nani unayti kwa masesebangti kwa peliyas tawian tap tapungkangan.
S.PHON: m nani unajti kwa masəsəβaŋti kwa pərijas tawian tap tapuŋkaŋan.
S.TRANSL: 洞穴那邊的懸崖很多都塌了.
Many cliffs near the cave collapsed.

S.FORM: m nayau kwa utuz a yau nani.
S.PHON: m najau kwa utuz~r a jau nani.
S.FORM: m nayau kwa utuz a yau nani.
S.PHON: m najau kwa utuz~r a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那時的地震就是那個樣子.
The earthquake was like that.

S.FORM: sinapawantiisu unay.
S.PHON: sinapawantiisu unaj.
S.FORM: sinapawantiisu unay.
S.PHON: sinapawantiisu unaj.
S.TRANSL: 那時你結婚了沒?
Were you married at that time?

S.FORM: m sanshijiu nian sinapawantiiku zinku u maipama.
S.PHON: m sanshijiu nian sinapawantiiku z~rinku u maipama.
S.FORM: m sanshijiu nian sinapawantiiku zinku u maipama.
S.PHON: m sanshijiu nian sinapawantiiku z~rinku u maipama.

TRANSL.notes: (民國)三十九年 ... 我想我結婚了,還是還沒呢?

S.TRANSL: 三十九年 ... 我想我結婚了,還是還沒呢?
In 1950 ... I think I was married, or maybe not?

S.FORM: XXXX yauti.
S.PHON: **** jauti.
S.FORM: XXXX yauti.
S.PHON: **** jauti.
S.TRANSL: 結了.
I was.

S.FORM: yauti haw.
S.PHON: jauti haw.
S.FORM: yauti haw.
S.PHON: jauti haw.
S.TRANSL: 結了嗎?
Were you?

S.FORM: sinapawanti na maipama sasunis.
S.PHON: sinapawanti na maipama sasunis.
S.FORM: sinapawanti na maipama sasunis.
S.PHON: sinapawanti na maipama sasunis.
S.TRANSL: 結婚了,但是還沒生小孩.

TRANSL.notes: (I) was married, but hadn't had any children yet.

S.TRANSL: was married, but hadn't had any children yet.

S.FORM: yaupamaimi tatebalonan yu 'nay Raya utuz.
S.PHON: jaupamaimi tatəβar*nan ju ʔnaj ʁaja utuz~r.
S.FORM: yaupamaimi tatebalonan yu 'nay Raya utuz.
S.PHON: jaupamaimi tatəβar*nan ju ʔnaj ʁaja utuz~r.
S.TRANSL: 大地震那時,我們還在tebalon那裡.
We were still at Tebalon when the strong earthquake happened.

S.FORM: aiku nani sepaRanku ya masang nayau a mutuz tu Raya 'nay nani kiyapamaiku.
S.PHON: aiku nani səpaʁanku ja masaŋ najau a mutuz~r tu ʁaja ʔnaj nani kijapamaiku.
S.FORM: aiku nani sepaRanku ya masang nayau a mutuz tu Raya 'nay nani kiyapamaiku.
S.PHON: aiku nani səpaʁanku ja masaŋ najau a mutuz~r tu ʁaja ʔnaj nani kijapamaiku.
S.TRANSL: 我知道以前那個大地震時,我還很小.
I was still very little when I knew the strong earthquake happened.

S.FORM: Rabtinpama tasawku unay nani.
S.PHON: ʁaβtinpama tasawku unaj nani.
S.FORM: Rabtinpama tasawku unay nani.
S.PHON: ʁaβtinpama tasawku unaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 我那時年紀才十歲.
I was only ten years old then.

S.FORM: utulu betin yau usiwa tasaw a 'nay.
S.PHON: uturu βətin jau usiwa tasaw a ʔnaj.
S.FORM: utulu betin yau usiwa tasaw a 'nay.
S.PHON: uturu βətin jau usiwa tasaw a ʔnaj.

TRANSL.notes: 那時是(民國)三十九年.

S.TRANSL: 那時是 三十九年.

S.FORM: nayau azu sanusu smuRap ya utuz a yau.
S.PHON: najau az~ru sanusu smuʁap ja utuz~r a jau.
S.FORM: nayau azu sanusu smuRap ya utuz a yau.
S.PHON: najau az~ru sanusu smuʁap ja utuz~r a jau.

TRANSL.notes: 正如你說的那樣,地震是(發生)在早上.

S.TRANSL: 正如你說的那樣,地震是 在早上.

TRANSL.notes: Like what you said, the earthquake (happened) in the early morning.

S.TRANSL: Like what you said, the earthquake in the early morning.

S.FORM: smuRap saizi qmanpamaita sataRbabi.
S.PHON: smuʁap saiz~ri qmanpamaita sataʁβaβi.
S.FORM: smuRap saizi qmanpamaita sataRbabi.
S.PHON: smuʁap saiz~ri qmanpamaita sataʁβaβi.

TRANSL.notes: 是早上沒錯,(因為)我們(那時候)還在吃早餐.

S.TRANSL: 是早上沒錯, 我們 還在吃早餐.
It was in the early morning. We were still eating breakfast.

S.FORM: utuz a yau baqiku matiw sa lazing putiamling miza ya Raybaut aizipna tikinzay.
S.PHON: utuz~r a jau βaqiku matiw sa raz~riŋ putiamriŋ miz~ra ja ʁajβaut aiz~ripna tikinz~raj.
S.FORM: utuz a yau baqiku matiw sa lazing putiamling miza ya Raybaut aizipna tikinzay.
S.PHON: utuz~r a jau βaqiku matiw sa raz~riŋ putiamriŋ miz~ra ja ʁajβaut aiz~ripna tikinz~raj.
S.TRANSL: 我阿公去海邊放網捕魚
My grandpa went to the sea to net and catch fish.

S.FORM: m kinawsa nayau.
S.PHON: m kinawsa najau.
S.FORM: m kinawsa nayau.
S.PHON: m kinawsa najau.
S.TRANSL: 他們,和sinzay兩個人.
They two ... together with Sinzay.

S.FORM: seqawalu qumni unay mana Raynguanku ka.
S.PHON: səqawaru qumni unaj mana ʁajŋuanku ka.
S.FORM: seqawalu qumni unay mana Raynguanku ka.
S.PHON: səqawaru qumni unaj mana ʁajŋuanku ka.
S.TRANSL: 那是夏天還是什麼時候?我怎麼不記得了?
Was it summer, or sometime else? How come I can't remember?

S.FORM: seqawalu seqawalu yu.
S.PHON: səqawaru səqawaru ju.
S.FORM: seqawalu seqawalu yu.
S.PHON: səqawaru səqawaru ju.
S.TRANSL: 是夏天.
It was summer.

S.FORM: seqawalu haw.
S.PHON: səqawaru haw.
S.FORM: seqawalu haw.
S.PHON: səqawaru haw.
S.TRANSL: 是夏天對吧?
It was summer, wasn't it?

S.FORM: m nani seqawalu.
S.PHON: m nani səqawaru.
S.FORM: m nani seqawalu.
S.PHON: m nani səqawaru.
S.TRANSL: 是夏天.
It was summer.

S.FORM: tuRabi ya wi nani taRbabi suna su sudatpa tu salilna nani.
S.PHON: tuʁaβi ja wi nani taʁβaβi suna su suɮatpa tu sarirna nani.
S.FORM: tuRabi ya wi nani taRbabi suna su sudatpa tu salilna nani.
S.PHON: tuʁaβi ja wi nani taʁβaβi suna su suɮatpa tu sarirna nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個晚上去,早上收網.

TRANSL.notes: (They) left at night and retrieved their net in the morning.

S.TRANSL: left at night and retrieved their net in the morning.

S.FORM: kinawsa ti kinzay yau a ipazna tu e iza u 'nay 'nay XXXX qiwiqiway a XXXX pelunana.
S.PHON: kinawsa ti kinz~raj jau a ipaz~rna tu ə iz~ra u ʔnaj ʔnaj **** qiwiqiwaj a **** pərunana.
S.FORM: kinawsa ti kinzay yau a ipazna tu e iza u 'nay 'nay XXXX qiwiqiway a XXXX pelunana.
S.PHON: kinawsa ti kinz~raj jau a ipaz~rna tu ə iz~ra u ʔnaj ʔnaj **** qiwiqiwaj a **** pərunana.
S.TRANSL: 他們左右划槳.
They roared left and right.

S.FORM: ipaz masang.
S.PHON: ipaz~r masaŋ.
S.FORM: ipaz masang.
S.PHON: ipaz~r masaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 以前的竹筏就是那樣.
The rafts in the past were like that.

S.FORM: n ya tu mana smani qaya mutuz unay nani.
S.PHON: n ja tu mana smani qaja mutuz~r unaj nani.
S.FORM: n ya tu mana smani qaya mutuz unay nani.
S.PHON: n ja tu mana smani qaja mutuz~r unaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 也不知道那個地震...
Not knowing the earthquake...

S.FORM: wiiku pasazui ta ngayauan na qani iza u na lepawan na qaniisaku tayan kwa taqawRian.
S.PHON: wiiku pasaz~rui ta ŋajauan na qani iz~ra u na rəpawan na qaniisaku tajan kwa taqawʁian.
S.FORM: wiiku pasazui ta ngayauan na qani iza u na lepawan na qaniisaku tayan kwa taqawRian.
S.PHON: wiiku pasaz~rui ta ŋajauan na qani iz~ra u na rəpawan na qaniisaku tajan kwa taqawʁian.
S.TRANSL: 我轉到isaku他們以前的家的前面,靠海的那個地方.
I turned toward the front of the house where Isaku once lived, toward the place near the sea.

S.FORM: nani maqayta ya betu a yau Rayaay.
S.PHON: nani maqajta ja βətu a jau ʁajaaj.
S.FORM: nani maqayta ya betu a yau Rayaay.
S.PHON: nani maqajta ja βətu a jau ʁajaaj.
S.TRANSL: 看到那個大石頭.

TRANSL.notes: (I) saw the the big rock.

S.TRANSL: saw the the big rock.

S.FORM: yautiimu tayan ya yaupamaimi ta mutuz. XXXX
S.PHON: jautiimu tajan ja jaupamaimi ta mutuz~r. ****
S.FORM: yautiimu tayan ya yaupamaimi ta mutuz. XXXX
S.PHON: jautiimu tajan ja jaupamaimi ta mutuz~r. ****
S.TRANSL: 地震那時,你們已經在那邊了嗎?
Had you been there when the earthquake happened?

S.FORM: yaupamaimi ta tayan ta zana kyukay tangi ta zana e taqsian.
S.PHON: jaupamaimi ta tajan ta z~rana kjukaj taŋi ta z~rana ə taqsian.
S.FORM: yaupamaimi ta tayan ta zana kyukay tangi ta zana e taqsian.
S.PHON: jaupamaimi ta tajan ta z~rana kjukaj taŋi ta z~rana ə taqsian.
S.TRANSL: 我們還在現在教會的那個地方,在學校那邊.
We were still at the place where the church is located now, near the school.

S.FORM: XXXX zinku ya taqsian ni liangu.
S.PHON: **** z~rinku ja taqsian ni riaŋu.
S.FORM: XXXX zinku ya taqsian ni liangu.
S.PHON: **** z~rinku ja taqsian ni riaŋu.
S.TRANSL: 學校,就在現在liangu住的那邊.

TRANSL.notes: School, beside (the place where) liangu lives now, I think.

S.TRANSL: School, beside liangu lives now, I think.

S.FORM: na usa usa.
S.PHON: na usa usa.
S.FORM: na usa usa.
S.PHON: na usa usa.
S.TRANSL: 不不不.
No, no, no.

S.FORM: tazianpamaimi ta izaan u tazana taqsian tatuqeban na taqsian tangi.
S.PHON: taz~rianpamaimi ta iz~raan u taz~rana taqsian tatuqəβan na taqsian taŋi.
S.FORM: tazianpamaimi ta izaan u tazana taqsian tatuqeban na taqsian tangi.
S.PHON: taz~rianpamaimi ta iz~raan u taz~rana taqsian tatuqəβan na taqsian taŋi.
S.TRANSL: 我們還在那個...那個...現在的學校的後面.
We were still at the ... the rear of the school.

S.FORM: XXXX takyukay tangi XXXX ta qani tina bayi tipilawan tuqeban.
S.PHON: **** takjukaj taŋi **** ta qani tina βaji tipirawan tuqəβan.
S.FORM: XXXX takyukay tangi XXXX ta qani tina bayi tipilawan tuqeban.
S.PHON: **** takjukaj taŋi **** ta qani tina βaji tipirawan tuqəβan.
S.TRANSL: 在現在的教會,Pilaw阿姨家的後面.

TRANSL.notes: (At the place where) the church is now. At the rear of Pilaw's (house).

S.TRANSL: the church is now. At the rear of Pilaw's .

S.FORM: o qaniiza qaya qaniahun atu ti iza kwa qanialan ti aswan.
S.PHON: * qaniiz~ra qaja qaniahun atu ti iz~ra kwa qaniaran ti aswan.
S.FORM: o qaniiza qaya qaniahun atu ti iza kwa qanialan ti aswan.
S.PHON: * qaniiz~ra qaja qaniahun atu ti iz~ra kwa qaniaran ti aswan.

TRANSL.notes: 也是在那個Ahun還有那個Alan和Asuan (家的後面).

S.TRANSL: 也是在那個Ahun還有那個Alan和Asuan .

TRANSL.notes: Also (at the rear of) ... Ahun's, and ... Alan's and Aswan's.

S.TRANSL: Also ... Ahun's, and ... Alan's and Aswan's.

S.FORM: e yau bayi tipaytawku.
S.PHON: ə jau βaji tipajtawku.
S.FORM: e yau bayi tipaytawku.
S.PHON: ə jau βaji tipajtawku.

TRANSL.notes: 還有Paytawku (的家).

S.TRANSL: 還有Paytawku .
And of Paytawku's.

S.FORM: n yaupama tayan na XXXX lepawna haw.
S.PHON: n jaupama tajan na **** rəpawna haw.
S.FORM: n yaupama tayan na XXXX lepawna haw.
